title: Skyesports Grand Slam/2022

[https://www.logitech.com/en-in Logitech] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=15,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2022-02-09 |edate=2022-02-16 |twitter=skyesportsindia |instagram=skyesportsgrandslam |web=http://www.skyesports.in/ |facebook=skyesportindia |youtube=channel/UCrsY_XXxKmCI8AI8gRf-0uw |previous=Skyesports_Grand_Slam/Invitational{{!}}2020 }} '''''[http://www.skyesports.in/ Skyesports]''''' in association with '''''[https://www.amd.com/en/ AMD]''''' present the second edition of ''Skyesports Grand Slam''. This tournament will have two titles, BGMI and Valorant, with a total prize pool of ₹30,00,000 INR. BGMI leg of the tournament carries a prize pool of ₹15,00,000 INR ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |b1=Spero|b1name=Piyush Bathla|b1flag=in |b2=Gamezo Tech|b2name=Subodh Panwar|b2flag=in |b3=Captain Price|b3name=Dhrubajyoti Das|b3flag=in }} {{box|break|padding=2em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=English Commentator |b1=Lucifer|b1link=Lucifer(Caster)|b1flag=in|b1name=Sanat Kumar |b2=Darshita|b2flag=in |b3=Raider|b3name=Shashank Singh|b3flag=in |b4=Arka|b4name=Arun Sagar|b4flag=in }} {{box|break|padding=2em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Kannada Commentator |b1=Spectra Gaming|b1flag=in |b2=Frost|b2name=Pranav|b2flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Skyesports Grandslam 2022:''' 21st January 2022 to 16th February 2022''. * '''''Qualifiers Round 1:''' 21st January 2022 to 22nd January 2022'' ** '' A total of 3000 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 1 ** '' Teams to be divided into 150 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play a single match'' ** '' Top 10 Teams from each group will qualify for the Qualifiers Round 2''. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 1500 teams}} advance to Qualifiers Round 2.'' * '''''Qualifiers Round 2:''' 23rd January 2022'' ** '' A total of 1500 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 2 ** '' Teams to be divided into 75 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play a single match'' ** '' Top 8 Teams from each group will qualify for the Qualifiers Round 3''. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 600 teams}} advance to Qualifiers Round 3 * '''''Qualifiers Round 3:''' 24th January 2022'' ** '' A total of 600 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 3 ** '' Teams to be divided into 30 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play a single match'' ** '' Top 8 Teams from each group will qualify for the Qualifiers Round 4''. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 240 teams}} advance to Qualifiers Round 4 * '''''Qualifiers Round 4:''' 25th January 2022'' ** '' A total of 240 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 4 ** '' Teams to be divided into 12 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play a total of 2 matches'' ** '' Top 5 Teams from each group will qualify for the Qualifiers Round 5''. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 60 teams}} advance to Qualifiers Round 5 * '''''Qualifiers Round 5:''' 26th January 2022'' ** '' A total of 60 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 5 ** '' Teams to be divided into 3 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play a total of 4 matches'' ** '' Top 4 Teams from each group will qualify for the Quarter Finals''. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 12 teams}} advance to Quarter Finals * '''''Quarter Finals:''' 28th January 2022 to 2nd February 2022'' ** '' A total of 24 teams (12 Qualified from Qualifiers Round 5 + 12 Invited) will play in the Quarter Finals'' ** '' Teams to be divided into 3 groups''. ** '' Teams will compete in a round robin format ** '' 36 Matches to be played over a period of 6 days (Each team to play 24 Matches)". ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 6 teams from the overall standings}} advance to Semifinals Finals.'' * '''''Semi Finals:''' 3rd February 2022 to 8th February 2022'' ** '' A total of 24 teams (6 Qualified from Quarter Finals + 18 Invited) will play in the Semi Finals'' ** '' Teams to be divided into 3 groups''. ** '' Teams will compete in a round robin format ** '' 30 Matches to be played over a period of 6 days (Each team to play 20 Matches)". ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 10 teams from the overall standings}} advance to Grand Finals.'' * '''''Grand Finals:''' 9th February 2022 to 16th February 2022'' ** '''Squad {{Abbr/TPP}}:''' 16 teams *** {{bgcolortext|stayup|'''''Top 2 Teams'''''}} from '''[[Skyesports_Grand_Slam/Invitational|Grand Slam 2020]]'''. *** {{bgcolortext|stayup|'''''Top 2 teams'''''}} from '''[[Skyesports/Championship/3.0|Championship 3.0]]'''. *** {{bgcolortext|stayup|'''''Top 2 teams'''''}} from '''[[Skyesports_Mobile_Open|Mobile Open]]'''. *** {{bgcolortext|stayup|'''''Top 10 teams'''''}} from Semi Finals. ** '' Teams will get to play a total of 42 matches in a period of 7 days'' ** '' Each day will feature a total of 6 matches ====Points Distribution==== {{{title|For
